---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Before filing:** skim [`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md) — your idea
> may already be planned (or explicitly out of scope).

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Vestige doesn't currently support (or
supports awkwardly)? Describe the user-facing goal, not just the
proposed implementation.

## Proposed solution

What would a good solution look like from the user's point of view?
Rough API sketches, UX notes, or examples from other engines are all
welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other designs you thought about, and why they seem worse than the
proposal above.

## Fit with the roadmap

Which phase of [`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md) does this belong to?
Is this a near-term addition to an existing phase, or a new phase?

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'd be willing to submit a PR (after agreeing on the design here).
- [ ] I'd be willing to help test a draft implementation.
- [ ] I'm filing the idea so it's on the radar — not volunteering to
      implement.

## Anything else

Links, references, prior-art engines, research papers, etc.
